results.name: ash
results.description: What's left after something (or someone) burns up.

results.name: asian
results.description: Characters whose appearances match an Asian ethnicity, primarily East and South East Asian. While Asia itself is not a monolith, this tag aims to provide a broad brush stroke.

results.name: a skeleton is in you
results.description: Revealing the structure inside us all.

results.name: assassin symbol
results.description: The symbol of the assassins in Assassin's Creed. Also the primary logo for the games.

results.name: astrotorium
results.description: Myra the Magnificent's Intergalactic Astrotorium of Fun, the main setting for Unfinity.

results.name: atog
results.description: An unusually voracious species, each with their own unique appetite.

results.name: attacking matters
results.description: Cards that care about you attacking.

results.name: attacking matters-any
results.description: Cards that care about anyone attacking.

results.name: attacking matters-self
results.description: Cards that care about themselves attacking.

results.name: attacking opponents matters
results.description: Cards that synergize with any attacker, as long as they're attacking an opponent of the card's controller.

results.name: aunt wu
results.description: The titular fortuneteller from the Avatar: The Last Airbender episode "The Fortuneteller."

results.name: au ra
results.description: Draconic (but not related to dragons) humanoid race from Final Fantasy XIV

results.name: auraify
results.description: Effects that turn things into auras.

results.name: aurochs
results.description: An ancient species of bovine, considered to be the ancestor of modern domestic cattle.
